completed_tasks: Published the validated form-first automatic score for 그대 내게 다시 in the Songs catalog.
Added the complete MusicXML and MIDI assets plus form-aware song metadata and four-measure section systems.
Loaded Melody, Piano RH, and Piano LH from the imported MusicXML while preserving the legacy generated chord-chart path.
Displayed the approved whole-song form digest before the notation.
Integrated origin/main compact chord typography, music-font resources, and three-measure mobile fallback without losing imported-score behavior.
Preserved imported track names and rests while continuing to hide those elements only for legacy chord charts.
notes: Desktop score layout uses four measures per system; the latest responsive compact layout reduces to three measures on a 390px viewport to preserve notation readability.
The automatic-draft disclosure continues to distinguish generated piano accompaniment from source transcription.
The latest main branch audio-to-score publication handoff and compact chord typography are included through the merge.
